title: MAS 307 适用对象 / Who MAS 307 applies to
point: MAS 307 依《保险法》s64(2) 颁布,适用于任何持牌寿险直接保险公司。 / MAS 307 is issued under s64(2) of the Insurance Act and applies to any direct insurer licensed to carry on life business.
keyfacts: Part I 强制 + Part II 非强制 / Part I mandatory + Part II non-mandatory

title: 推出新子基金的通知期 / Notice to launch a sub-fund
point: 推出任何新 ILP 子基金须在设立前至少 21 天通知 MAS。 / The insurer must notify MAS at least 21 days before establishing any new ILP sub-fund.
keyfacts: 重大变更须提前≥1个月通知 / Significant changes need ≥1 month notice

title: 单位定价 / Unit pricing
point: 单位价格 = 子基金 NAV ÷ 流通单位数(初始发售期除外),可按披露费用调整。 / Unit price = sub-fund NAV ÷ units outstanding (except during the initial offer period), adjustable by disclosed fees.
keyfacts: NAV = 总资产 - 总负债 / NAV = total assets less total liabilities
sourceRef: MAS Notice 307 paras 12-13; Definition of NAV

title: 资本保证子基金到期 / Capital guaranteed at maturity
point: 资本保证子基金到期时,单位以保证金额与 NAV/单位数二者较高者赎回。 / At maturity, a capital guaranteed sub-fund redeems units at the higher of the guaranteed amount or NAV per unit.

title: 两种年度审计法 / Two annual audit methods
point: 保险公司须每年外审:第一法审子基金财务报表,第二法审内控与流程;首次改用第二法须事先书面通知 MAS。 / The insurer must appoint an annual external audit: first method audits each sub-fund's financial statements, second method audits internal controls/processes; the first switch to the second method needs prior written notice to MAS.
keyfacts: 改用第二法后再改法须 MAS 批准 / Later method changes need MAS approval

title: 终止子基金审计证明时限 / Audit certificate deadlines
point: 终止/到期子基金的审计证明须在 6 个月内完成,完成后 30 天内送交 MAS,并保留 5 年。 / The audit certificate for a terminated/matured sub-fund must be completed within 6 months, sent to MAS within 30 days of completion, and retained for 5 years.
keyfacts: 5年内保单持有人请求须30天内提供 / Provide to policyholder within 30 days if requested within 5 years

title: Premium charge 披露 / Premium charge disclosure
point: 2021年10月8日起发行的 ILP,前端扣费须合并披露为单一"premium charge",禁止使用"premium allocation rate"。 / For ILPs issued on/after 8 Oct 2021, upfront deductions must be disclosed as a single "premium charge"; the term "premium allocation rate" is prohibited.

title: 软美元例外 / Soft dollar exceptions
point: 管理人不得为自身留存回扣;软美元须满足合理协助投资建议、最优执行、不做不必要交易方可收受,旅行/住宿/娱乐不合格。 / The manager must not retain rebates; soft dollars are allowed only if they reasonably assist investment advice, best execution is achieved, and no unnecessary trades are made — travel/accommodation/entertainment do not qualify.
keyfacts: 须保留所有软美元记录 / Keep a record of all soft dollars received

title: 估值错误补偿门槛 / Valuation error threshold
point: 估值错误达调整后 NAV/单位 0.5% 或以上须补偿保单持有人及子基金;单一持有人补偿不超过 $20 可免。 / A valuation error of 0.5% or more of post-adjustment NAV per unit triggers compensation to policyholders and the sub-fund; exempt if any single policyholder's compensation is $20 or less.
keyfacts: <0.5% 无强制补偿 / Below 0.5% no mandatory compensation

title: 赎回付款时限 / Redemption payout timeframes
point: 债券与货币市场子基金 T+4、馈给型(投入另一 CIS)T+7、其他类型 T+6 个工作日。 / Bond and money market sub-funds T+4, feeder funds investing in another CIS T+7, other types T+6 business days.
keyfacts: T = 收到完整赎回请求后的下一定价日 / T = next pricing day after a complete request

title: 跨境子管理门槛 / Sub-managing abroad threshold
point: 子基金超 10% 资产跨境子管理时,保险公司连同关联公司须已在新加坡管理至少 S$5 亿全权委托资金。 / Where over 10% of a sub-fund's assets are sub-managed abroad, the insurer with related corporations must already manage at least S$500 million of discretionary funds in Singapore.

title: 命名禁用词 / Prohibited naming terms
point: ILP 子基金命名不得误导,禁止使用"capital protected"与"principal protected"及其衍生形式。 / ILP sub-fund names must not mislead; the terms "capital protected" and "principal protected" (and derivatives) are prohibited.
keyfacts: 违反须3个工作日内通知 MAS / Breaches reported to MAS within 3 business days
